updateProcess();
soundId = pickSound();
ds.playOneShot(soundId);
}
do / {
soundPlaying = ds.isPlaying(soundId);
}

# FileTop = ""
AutoExpandedVars = """// These variables can be referenced in diagram and are automatically prefixed with "this.vars." during code generation
// Protected variables, must be set by inheriting class
protected Driver_Sound ds;
protected String soundId;

// Private variables, only used locally
private boolean soundPlaying = false;
"""
DefaultVarExpTemplate = "this.vars.{AutoNameCopy()}"

# TriggerMap = ""

[SmRunnerSettings]
transpilerId = "Java"

[RenderConfig.Java]
Package = "tankpack"
# Imports = ""
Extends = "StateMachine"
# Implements = "Runnable"

ClassCode = """// ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 // Class code
 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 
 // Must be overridden by inheriting class
 protected String pickSound()
 {
 return null;
 }

 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 // End of class code
 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
